emails.subject: Swap forms
emails.body: Swap forms Deborah asked me to find swap forms that you left behind she said these forms were prepared for vicki sharp. let me know.

emails.subject: RE: Swap forms
emails.body: RE: Swap forms Raquel, Look under my general file in the j drive. There should be a folder labeled "Fast Track". In that folder, there should be a document titled either "Fast Track Swap Agreement" or "Swap Agreement". There could be multiple drafts of this document, so use the one with the most recent date. To: Rapp, Bill
